items.claim: BSD makes a high volume of mistakes in his grappling exchanges.
items.quote: He's making a ton of mistakes in the grappling.

items.claim: BSD performs poorly when he is on his back.
items.quote: BSD on his back looks very bad.
I think BSD by decision is actually very sneaky this week and very live because of how durable Patty is.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff.
Conor McGregor is dealing with the lingering effects of a past leg injury.
Max Holloway is a highly durable fighter despite his recent knockout loss to Topuria.
items.quote: Max Holloway is still, although he's been knocked out by Taporia, he's still one of the most durable guys in UFC freaking history.

items.claim: Max Holloway is a hittable target for opponents.
